reviews.review_title: I love how the monsters look
reviews.review_description: I play the game 24/7 meeting admins and my biggest dream is to become staff if i was staff I would keep watch of players ban the players that hack,or say any slurs or threats and insults i love this game I try to make everyone happy by giving them bundles and mods and I hope that I will become an admin in this game
Basically just ape storage revived but can you add the actual jumpscares like BMgus and lurkers and fix movement?
This is game actually so I have playing this for 2 weeks so good
The game was better in 2024 to 2025 but 2026 is just not good i quited the game but I still like tho.
It talks about your private parts when walk into shops

reviews.review_title: This game is horrible do not recommend
reviews.review_description: This game is horrible the movement is so weird and hard to use and a lot of buttons dont work there is really weird posters in this game that says inappropriate stuff monsters are super buggy and freeze i would not recommend playing this game i would just play any other scary gorilla tag fan game
i dont like the FACT that the movement are bad

The game is good, i only got this one because the other lethal ape redux servers i think are down or not working. The only bad thing is that the game has bounce physics. They dont seem to bother other players but i dont work well with bounce physics. Cant run properly, and when i try to jump i wiggle in the air(😭💔🥀) and all the monsters ive seen basically all have the same jumpscare. But other than that it isnt too bad.
You cant run from the monsters because of the weird ahh movement
So there is a bug were you can’t join a server and this made me mad but the game looks so great
